Text:
80 beers are heading to the World Beer Bar this year, the strongest international line-up we have brought to the festival.

From Belgium, a full sweep of styles: easy-drinking fruit beers, traditional gueuze and lambics from venerated producers, Trappist and Abbey-style beers, and a couple of low or no alcohol surprises. From Germany, a strong selection of kellerbiers, lagers, pils and wheat beers, several not seen at HBCF before.

Plus a smaller selection from Denmark, Estonia, France, Norway, Spain, and a handful from England we could not resist.

Swipe through to see who is pouring. Whatever you drink, there is something on the World Beer Bar with your name on it.

Advance tickets are on sale now:
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #WorldBeer #BelgianBeer #GermanBeer #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent
